info.name: Laravel API Documentation
info.description: Advertising Platform API - A comprehensive API for managing advertisements, stores, traders, and user interactions.

item.name:
Register a new user account.

Creates a new user account with the provided credentials. Upon successful registration,
returns user details along with an authentication token.

User login.

Authenticates a user with phone and password credentials and returns an authentication token.

Register a new trader account.

Creates a new trader account with store details. Upon successful registration,
returns trader details along with an authentication token.

Trader login.

Authenticates a trader with phone and password credentials and returns an authentication token.

User logout.

Logs out the authenticated user by invalidating their current access token.

Trader logout.

Logs out the authenticated trader by invalidating their current access token.

Update user profile.

Updates the authenticated user's profile information including name and email.

Get authenticated user profile.

Retrieves the complete profile information of the currently authenticated user.

Get list of cities.

Retrieves a list of all available cities in the system.

Update trader profile.

Updates the authenticated trader's profile information including city, contact numbers, and store description.

formdata.description: Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must not be greater than 20 characters.
Must not be greater than 20 characters.
optional Description of the store (max 500 characters).
optional City where the store is located.

item.name:
Get authenticated trader profile.

Retrieves the complete profile information of the currently authenticated trader including store details and subcategories.

Change trader password.

Allows the authenticated trader to change their account password.

Get list of advertisements.

Retrieves a paginated list of advertisements filtered by category and type.
Advertisements can be either normal or special (promoted).

query.description: optional Filter by store category ID.
optional Number of items per page.

item.name:
Get list of advertisements.

Retrieves a paginated list of advertisements filtered by category and type.
Advertisements can be either normal or special (promoted).

query.description: optional Filter by store category ID.
optional Number of items per page.

item.name:
Get list of posts.

Retrieves a paginated list of posts from stores. Users can view all available posts.

query.description: optional Number of items per page.

item.name:
Search advertisements.

Searches for advertisements based on keywords and filters.

query.description: optional Search keyword for advertisement title or description.
optional Number of items per page.

item.name:

query.description: optional Search keyword for store name or description.
optional Number of items per page.

item.name:
Toggle favorite advertisement.

Adds or removes an advertisement from the authenticated user's favorites list.
If the advertisement is already favorited, it will be unfavorited and vice versa.

variable.description: Advertisement ID to toggle favorite status.

item.name:
Toggle favorite store.

Adds or removes a store from the authenticated user's favorites list.
If the store is already favorited, it will be unfavorited and vice versa.

variable.description: Store ID to toggle favorite status.

item.name:
Toggle block store.

Blocks or unblocks a store for the authenticated user. Blocked stores and their
advertisements will be hidden from the user's feed.

variable.description: Store ID to toggle block status.

item.name:
Get blocked stores.

Retrieves a paginated list of all stores that the authenticated user has blocked.

query.description: optional Number of items per page.
